notes: Use these as Create Case payload templates in support_hub.
caseId is auto-generated in the app; keep title/description/severity/category and optional metadata.
Set orgId/customerId through logged-in org membership (or align manually if using scripts).

Resolver decisions: the Python service applies policy after the LLM — clarify when triage lists missing_information (e.g. vague 'GitHub is broken' tickets), escalate for auth-related cases with explicit repeat markers (e.g. 'third reopen') or when get_case_history returns 'repeated unresolved…' events (see mock org-pro).
Mock tool data keys org_acme_platform and org_globex_api match the db:seed org ids; org-pro is for fixture-style escalation demos (create that org in /admin if needed).

clarify.title: GitHub is broken for our org this morning
clarify.description: Everything is failing for our developers. Nothing works right now and we need urgent help.

clarify.title: Platform unstable — need help now
clarify.description: Customer reports random failures but does not provide endpoint, workflow, users, or timestamps.

escalate.title: Third reopen: PAT + SSO access still failing in automation
escalate.description: This is the third support case in two weeks. Previous steps did not restore org API access for deployment automation (token and SSO).

escalate.title: PAT fails on org APIs — repeated unresolved per prior cases
escalate.description: Developer PAT still fails for organization resources after multiple unsuccessful resolution attempts documented in prior tickets.

escalate.title: Optional: case history tool shows repeated unresolved (use mock org-pro)
escalate.description: Same PAT symptom as scenario 3 fixtures; org-pro mock data includes repeated unresolved token events so tooling surfaces escalation.

resolve.title: REST jobs return 429 — likely rate limit, not outage
resolve.description: Scheduled REST calls started returning HTTP 429 with retry-after headers this week; customer suspects an outage but metrics look like throttling.

resolve.title: Paid feature missing — check entitlement vs plan
resolve.description: Org admin expects advanced security controls in repo settings but UI shows upgrade prompts despite believing they are on Team.

samples.title: Code security panel missing despite Enterprise Cloud contract
samples.description: Our platform org renewed Enterprise Cloud last month, but code security options are not visible in repository settings for newly created repos.

samples.title: Secret scanning unavailable for one org in enterprise account
samples.description: Secret scanning is enabled at enterprise policy level, but one child organization cannot enable it and sees feature unavailable.

samples.title: Audit log streaming toggle hidden after org migration
samples.description: After moving repositories to a new organization, admin cannot find audit log streaming setup and believes entitlement was removed.

samples.title: Team plan org cannot use protected environments
samples.description: Billing shows active paid subscription, but deployment protection rules are disabled with a message that plan upgrade is required.

samples.title: Actions minutes unexpectedly blocked on paid org
samples.description: CI pipelines stopped because Actions minutes appear exhausted even though finance confirms invoice payment was completed.

samples.title: Copilot for Business seats not usable after renewal
samples.description: Renewal was processed but assigned users cannot access Copilot Business features and see plan limitation prompts.

samples.title: PAT works for personal repos but 403 on org repo settings
samples.description: Developer can list personal repositories but gets 403 when reading organization repository settings via REST API.

samples.title: Fine-grained PAT rejected for org-level webhooks endpoint
samples.description: Token authenticates successfully but fails on organization webhook APIs with resource not accessible by personal access token.

samples.title: PAT stopped working for org projects after SSO enforcement
samples.description: Same token used in automation now fails only for org project APIs after organization enabled stricter SSO requirements.

samples.title: Nightly integration reports GitHub outage due to 429 spikes
samples.description: Customer says GitHub API is unstable because overnight jobs return many 429 responses and delayed retries.

samples.title: Webhook replay worker hitting secondary rate limit
samples.description: Replay service makes burst requests and receives secondary rate limit errors even though primary limit seems available.

samples.title: Enterprise export tool throttled across multiple runners
samples.description: Export jobs from multiple runners trigger throttling and customer suspects platform regression after no code changes.

samples.title: Users blocked from org login after IdP certificate rotation
samples.description: All users are redirected to IdP but fail on return with signature validation error after certificate rollover.

samples.title: Subset of users cannot complete SAML login
samples.description: Only users in a specific identity group fail SAML authentication while admins still succeed.

samples.title: SAML response accepted by IdP but rejected by GitHub
samples.description: Identity provider shows success, but GitHub denies access and loops users back to login for enterprise org.

samples.title: Third reopen: PAT + SSO access still failing in automation
samples.description: This is the third support case in two weeks. Previous steps did not restore org API access for deployment automation.

samples.title: Recurring SSO authorization drift for service account token
samples.description: Token periodically loses effective access to org resources despite repeated reauthorization and policy checks.

samples.title: Multiple failed resolutions for mixed PAT scope and SSO problem
samples.description: Support history shows prior clarifications but issue remains unresolved and now blocks monthly compliance exports.

samples.title: GitHub is broken for our org this morning
samples.description: Everything is failing for our developers. Nothing works right now and we need urgent help.

samples.title: Platform unstable, can you fix this now
samples.description: Customer reports random failures but does not provide endpoint, workflow, users, or timestamps.

samples.title: Organization cannot work on GitHub
samples.description: Customer message says they are blocked but gives no reproducible steps, no errors, and no affected feature area.

samples.title: Past-due invoice and failing deployment API tokens
samples.description: Finance sees unpaid invoice warning and engineering automation tokens now fail for org repos during deployments.

samples.title: Upgrade requested, paid feature still locked and API jobs down
samples.description: Customer requested plan upgrade but still cannot access expected features and scheduled API jobs are failing with auth errors.

samples.title: Renewal confusion plus sudden rate-limit failures
samples.description: Customer disputes billing state after renewal and reports API workflows now throttled heavily, causing missed SLAs.
